summary: Comprehensive testing of Iteration 13 features: Admin panel with Vikram@900 credentials, Today New Users modal with clickable user details, Users tab showing all 27 users, User detail modal with deposits/withdrawals/bets/winnings tabs, and Push notification localStorage key fix. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly with dark theme.

issues: Console warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - minor React state update warning, does not affect functionality
Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/admin/login with Vikram@900 / Vikram@900 works
POST /api/auth/admin/login with admin@sattamatka.com / Admin@123 works
POST /api/auth/admin/login rejects invalid credentials (401)
GET /api/admin/stats returns all required fields including today_new_users
GET /api/admin/today-new-users returns user list with full details
GET /api/admin/today-deposits returns deposits with user details
GET /api/admin/users?limit=500 returns all 27 users (not truncated)
GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/deposits returns user deposits
GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/withdrawals returns user withdrawals
GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/bets returns user bets with stats
GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/winnings returns user winnings
GET /api/push/vapid-key returns valid VAPID public key
GET /api/admin/games returns games list
GET /api/admin/withdrawals returns withdrawals
GET /api/admin/deposits returns deposits
GET /api/admin/settings returns settings
Admin Login Page loads with dark theme
Admin Panel loads with dark theme and all 8 tabs visible
Admin stat cards show: कुल यूजर्स (27), आज की बेट्स, आज नए यूजर्स (0), लंबित निकासी
Clicking 'आज नए यूजर्स' stat card opens modal with today's new users
Today New Users modal shows empty state 'आज कोई नया यूजर नहीं' when 0 users
Users tab shows all 27 users with search functionality
Clicking user in Users tab opens detail modal with 4 stats cards
User detail modal has 4 tabs: जमा, निकासी, बेट्स, जीत
User detail modal shows Wallet Management button
Push notification subscribePush uses localStorage key 'matka11_token' (verified in index.js line 67)
critical_code_review_comments: Push notification localStorage key correctly changed from 'token' to 'matka11_token' in index.js
Today New Users modal in AdminPage.js has clickable user cards with Eye icon that open detailed user view
AdminUsersTab.js correctly fetches all users with limit=500
User detail endpoints properly return deposits, withdrawals, bets, and winnings data
Dark theme correctly applied across all admin pages (bg-[#0A0A0C])
All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for stat cards and tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 testing complete. All requested features verified: 1) Admin login with Vikram@900 works ✓, 2) Today New Users modal opens and shows empty state correctly ✓, 3) Clicking user in Today Users modal would open detail modal (no users today to test), 4) Users tab shows all 27 users ✓, 5) User detail modal has deposits/withdrawals/bets/winnings tabs ✓, 6) Push notification localStorage key fixed to 'matka11_token' ✓, 7) VAPID key endpoint works ✓. Dark theme is correctly applied. Backend uses modular routes in /routes/ directory. Frontend uses component-based admin tabs in /admin/ directory.

admin_stat_cards.total_users: ✓ Shows 27 users, clickable to Users tab

today_new_users_modal.opens_on_click: ✓ Modal opens when stat card clicked
today_new_users_modal.empty_state: ✓ Shows 'आज कोई नया यूजर नहीं' when 0 users
